title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 11–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Luffy, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Kuma, Dorry as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All right!! My belly's full! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No way!! is what we heard true?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are the sea levels really still rising!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Again, I've got no idea who you're talking about!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't both dance around like this, you blocked!! Who's gonna put out the fires?! Gaba BA BA BA BABA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon!! Don'tcha wanna blow these guys outta the water?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't keep up with you in that form...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you can!! I don't know how your powers work, but I'm sure you've got this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's just how I look when I'm totally free!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I swear... I'll raise her well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wah Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya H

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
